creator: wcarson.bugzilla@disillusion.net
text:
I can't seem to get p5-Net-SSLeay 1.92 to build on FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE-p4, LibreSSL 3.8.2, and latest ports tree.

I'm seeing this error:

SSLeay.c:4505:11: warning: call to undeclared function 'SSL_SESSION_dup'; ISO C99 and later do not support implicit function declarations [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        RETVAL = SSL_SESSION_dup(sess);
                 ^
SSLeay.c:4505:9: error: incompatible integer to pointer conversion assigning to 'SSL_SESSION *' (aka 'struct ssl_session_st *') from 'int' [-Wint-conversion]
        RETVAL = SSL_SESSION_dup(sess);
               ^ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
SSLeay.c:4507:2: warning: '(' and '{' tokens introducing statement expression appear in different macro expansion contexts [-Wcompound-token-split-by-macro]
        PUSHi(PTR2IV(RETVAL));
        ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
